title: MENTAL HEALTH CARE - 211info
text: SPRINGFIELD EDUCATION OFFICE BEHAVIORAL HEALTH & EDUCATION SERVICES MENTAL HEALTH CARE Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Provides bilingual mental health evaluations and services including individual, couples, and family therapy. 1621 Centennial Boulevard Springfield, OR 97477 Eligibility: Age 6 and older; primarily focus is Latino and immigrant population Hours: Monday-Friday 9am-noon and 1pm-6pm, after hours appointments available by request (541) 686-8483 2 Get Directions Visit Website Phone/FAX Numbers (541) 686-8483 Ext: 2 Main phone INTAKE PROCEDURE: Call for appointment FEES: Varies; accepts OHP, Lane County, PacificSource, Trillium, and Moda. Sliding scale available for those uninsured. DOCUMENTS: Insurance information, if applicable. Proof of income if applying for sliding scale fees. LANGUAGES: English, Spanish AREA SERVED: Lane County SITE HOURS: Monday/Wednesday/Friday 8:30am-1:30pm, Tuesday/Thursday 9am-noon Services: Adolescent/Youth Counseling * Hispanic/Latino Community Adolescent/Youth Counseling * Immigrants Community Mental Health Agencies * Hispanic/Latino Community Community Mental Health Agencies * Immigrants Family Counseling * Hispanic/Latino Community Family Counseling * Immigrants Individual Counseling * Hispanic/Latino Community Individual Counseling * Immigrants Mental Health Evaluation * Hispanic/Latino Community Mental Health Evaluation * Immigrants Other Services Offered At This Location: EDUCATIONAL PROGRAMS - ADULT EDUCATION CLASSES EDUCATIONAL PROGRAMS - YOUTH & FAMILIES SUBSTANCE USE DISORDER SERVICES - SUBSTANCE USE DISORDER SERVICES If you represent this agency, update your listing here . * The community resource directory information is up to date to the best of our knowledge. However, you should always call the provider to confirm this information and make an appointment. Be sure to confirm payment information with the provider, if payment is required. 211Info does not rate, recommend or endorse any agency. We simply provide information as a public service.
